description_long: This delivery robot features a polygonal, faceted body with a teal-colored central section bordered by gold trim, giving it a futuristic and armored appearance. It stands on six long, slender, black legs that are jointed and splayed outward, resembling those of a spider, which likely provide stability and mobility over urban terrain. The front of the robot is distinguished by two prominent gold mandible-like appendages, suggesting a functional or decorative element. The top of the body is flat and black, with gold accents and a small teal panel, possibly for status indication or access. The overall design is sleek and angular, with a combination of matte and metallic finishes. There are no visible wheels, screens, or brand logos, and the robot appears to be constructed primarily from metal and composite materials.
description: A spider-like delivery robot with a faceted teal and black body, gold trim, and six long, jointed black legs. The front features gold mandible-like appendages and a sleek, armored design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the teal faceted body, gold trim, and prominent gold mandible-like appendages.
description_view_1: Rear view reveals a flat black back with a small teal panel and the splayed arrangement of the six legs.
description_view_2: Side view highlights the angular body shape, teal panels, and the outward splay of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite front view again shows the gold mandibles and the geometric body, with a clear view of the leg arrangement.
attribute_compartment_access_panel: A possible access panel is located on the top rear section, marked by a small teal rectangle, but no visible handles or hinges.
